hero.headline: Premium Thai Rice — Grown in Thailand. Trusted Worldwide.
hero.subheadline: We supply bulk jasmine rice, white rice, glutinous rice and more to importers, wholesalers, and distributors across 40+ countries. Reliable supply. Export-certified. Built for global trade.

heroTrust: ✓ No minimum hassle — flexible MOQ  ✓ Fast quote response (within 24h)  ✓ GMP & HACCP certified

about.label: About TAT Global
about.headline: A Trusted Name in Thai Rice Manufacturing Since Decades
about.body1: TAT GLOBAL CO., LTD is a Thailand-based bulk rice manufacturer and international distributor committed to delivering premium quality rice to buyers worldwide. Operating from the heart of Thailand's rice belt, we manage every step of the supply chain — from paddy sourcing and milling to export documentation and container loading.
about.body2: With decades of experience in the Thai agricultural industry, we serve international importers, food distributors, supermarket chains, hospitality suppliers, and government procurement agencies across Asia, the Middle East, Africa, Europe, and the Americas.
about.body3: Our facilities operate under internationally recognized food safety standards including GMP, HACCP, and ISO 22000. Every shipment is supported by full export documentation: Certificates of Analysis, Phytosanitary Certificates, Certificates of Origin, and Halal certification (where required).

aboutPage.ctaHeadline: Looking for a Reliable Thai Rice Supplier?
aboutPage.ctaBody: Request a competitive quote today and get a response from our export team within 24 hours. No obligation — just a conversation about your requirements.

products.label: Our Products
products.headline: Premium Rice Varieties for Every Market
products.subheadline: From fragrant jasmine to industrial broken rice — all sourced, milled, and exported directly from Thailand.

1121_sella_basmati_rice.name: 1121 Sella Basmati Rice
1121_sella_basmati_rice.shortDescription: Long-grain marvel with elongated grains ideal for biryanis and pilafs. Distinct Basmati fragrance and non-sticky texture after cooking.
1121_sella_basmati_rice.brokenSpec: Purity: Free from impurities, stones, and foreign matter
1121_sella_basmati_rice.fullDescription: 1121 Sella Basmati Rice is a revered variant known for superior quality. Grains measure 8.2mm to 8.4mm for an extraordinary culinary experience, with captivating Basmati aroma and delicate, non-sticky texture post-cooking. TAT Global processes and curates each batch to preserve natural essence and nutritional richness, with rigorous quality control and export-ready inventory meeting international benchmarks.

technicalSpecifications.value: Free from impurities, stones, and foreign matter

arborio_rice.name: Arborio Rice
arborio_rice.shortDescription: Medium to short plump grains with pearly appearance. Moisture ≤14%, purity assured, uniform grain size. In stock ready to ship.
arborio_rice.grainSpec: Grain Size: Medium to short, plump, rounded
arborio_rice.fullDescription: Arborio Rice (Oryza sativa var. Arborio) features medium to short grains with a plump, rounded shape and distinct pearly appearance. Known for absorbing liquids while retaining a firm exterior and creamy interior when cooked — ideal for risotto and gourmet dishes. TAT Global supplies export-grade Arborio rice for restaurants, hotels, and food manufacturers.

technicalSpecifications.value: Firm exterior, creamy interior when cooked

irri_6_long_grain_rice.name: IRRI-6 Long Grain Rice
irri_6_long_grain_rice.shortDescription: Premium IRRI-6 long grain rice — outstanding quality and versatile use from everyday meals to gourmet cuisine.
irri_6_long_grain_rice.fullDescription: IRRI-6 Long Grain Rice is renowned for long, slender grains that remain separate and fluffy after cooking — ideal for pilafs, biryanis, stir-fries, and side dishes. Mild taste and subtle aroma enhance flavors without overpowering. Rich in carbohydrates and essential nutrients. Each grain is carefully cleaned and polished; cultivated using sustainable practices.

japonica_rice.name: Japonica Rice
japonica_rice.shortDescription: Short to medium-grain rice with sticky, firm cooking texture. Opalescent white grains with glossy sheen. Moisture below 14%; broken grains less than 5%.
japonica_rice.grainSpec: Grain Type: Short to medium-grain, slightly plump
japonica_rice.fullDescription: Japonica Rice (Oryza sativa japonica) is revered for exceptional quality and Japanese heritage. Sticky consistency ideal for sushi, onigiri, and Japanese-inspired dishes; subtle sweetness enhances accompanying flavors. Milled and polished to opalescent white with glossy sheen. Compliant with ISO, HACCP, and international food safety standards.

jasmine_rice_thai_hom_mali.name: Jasmine Rice (Thai Hom Mali)
jasmine_rice_thai_hom_mali.shortDescription: Fragrant Thai Hom Mali Jasmine Rice — aromatic excellence from Thailand. Premium long-grain rice from Thailand's finest growing regions.
jasmine_rice_thai_hom_mali.fullDescription: Thai Hom Mali Jasmine Rice embodies fragrance and quality. Long-grained with nutty smell and delicate pandan aroma — a key Thai export from the north and central eastern regions. Hom Mali refers to pandan/screwpine aroma; the Jasmine trade name reflects the white grain. Finest class grown in Ubon Ratchathani, Buriram, Sisaket, Roi Et, Yasothon, and Surin. TAT Global mills to export grade with ISO, HACCP, and Thai Agricultural Standards (TAS) compliance.
jasmine_rice_thai_hom_mali.storage: Cool, dry place away from direct sunlight

parboiled_rice_5_broken.name: Parboiled Rice 5% Broken
parboiled_rice_5_broken.shortDescription: Five Percent Broken Parboiled Long and Medium Grain Rice — rich aroma, good taste, and high nutritious value.
parboiled_rice_5_broken.fullDescription: 5% Broken Parboiled Rice is treated using advanced technologies and global industrial standards. Known for rich aroma, good taste, and high nutritious value. Customized packaging available upon request. TAT Global supplies export-grade parboiled rice for international buyers.

quality_brown_rice.name: Quality Brown Rice
quality_brown_rice.shortDescription: Premium Brown Rice — nutritious whole grain with nutty flavor and chewy texture. Packed with fiber, essential nutrients, and antioxidants.
quality_brown_rice.fullDescription: Brown Rice is a wholesome choice combining health and taste. Minimal processing retains the bran layer, germ, and nutrient-rich qualities. Medium to long grains with earthy hues, distinct chewy texture and nutty flavor — ideal for pilafs, stir-fries, and salads. High fiber, essential minerals, B vitamins, and antioxidants promote digestive health and overall well-being.

irri_9_long_grain_rice.name: RRI 9 Long Grain Rice
irri_9_long_grain_rice.shortDescription: IRRI 9 Long Grain Rice — long, slender grains that remain separate and fluffy after cooking. Subtle aroma and delicate flavor.
irri_9_long_grain_rice.fullDescription: IRRI 9 Long Grain Rice is celebrated for long, slender grains ideal for biryani, pilaf, side dishes, and rice salads. Mild taste complements a wide range of ingredients and spices. Rich in carbohydrates, vitamins, and minerals. Meticulously cleaned and polished; cultivated using sustainable agricultural practices.

thai_brown_jasmine_rice.name: Thai Brown Jasmine Rice
thai_brown_jasmine_rice.shortDescription: Whole-grain aromatic jasmine rice retaining the outer bran layer for added nutrition, nuttier flavor, and chewier texture.
thai_brown_jasmine_rice.grainSpec: Variety: Long Grain Rice | Shape: Long | Colour: Brown
thai_brown_jasmine_rice.fullDescription: Brown Jasmine Rice retains its outer bran layer for a nuttier flavor and chewier texture compared to white jasmine rice. Higher fiber, vitamins, and minerals — an excellent whole-grain choice. Requires slightly more water and longer cooking time; the added nutritional benefits and unique flavor profile are well worth the effort.

thai_glutinous_rice.name: Thai Glutinous Rice
thai_glutinous_rice.shortDescription: Traditional sticky rice (khao niao) — short to medium grains, intensely sticky when cooked. Naturally sweet flavor with subtle aroma.
thai_glutinous_rice.grainSpec: Grain Size: Short to medium, plump, round
thai_glutinous_rice.fullDescription: Glutinous rice is gluten-free despite its name — known for sticky, chewy texture when cooked. Used in mango sticky rice, Thai curries, rice dumplings, and desserts. Rich in carbohydrates with manganese, fiber, and essential vitamins. TAT Global supplies export-grade Thai glutinous rice in bulk and retail packaging.

thai_glutinous_rice_25_broken.name: Thai Glutinous Rice 25% Broken
thai_glutinous_rice_25_broken.shortDescription: Glutinous rice with 25% broken grains — sticky texture maintained; suitable for commercial and industrial use.
thai_glutinous_rice_25_broken.fullDescription: Thai Glutinous Rice 25% Broken grade with detailed export specifications for sticky rice applications. Maintains inherent sticky texture for commercial food manufacturing and industrial use.

thai_hom_patum_rice.name: Thai Hom Patum Rice
thai_hom_patum_rice.shortDescription: Pathum Thani fragrant rice (RD31) — certified fragrant rice with soft texture when freshly cooked; texture firms as it cools.
thai_hom_patum_rice.fullDescription: Thai Hom Patum (Pathumthani Fragrant Rice) is developed at Thailand's Pathum Thani rice institute. With appearance, soft texture, and fragrance similar to Thai jasmine rice, it is considered a second sort of Thai Hom Mali. Export-grade milling with Extra Well Milled degree.

thai_jasmine_black_cargo_rice.name: Thai Jasmine Black Cargo Rice
thai_jasmine_black_cargo_rice.shortDescription: Black cargo rice with good taste and unique fragrance. Only husk removed to retain nutrients, vitamins, and minerals.
thai_jasmine_black_cargo_rice.fullDescription: Thai Jasmine Black Cargo Rice is black in color with good taste and unique fragrance. Only its husk has been removed to retain nutrients, vitamins, and minerals including vitamin B1, B2, B complex, iron, magnesium, phosphorus, calcium, niacin, and fiber.

thai_jasmine_red_cargo_rice.name: Thai Jasmine Red Cargo Rice
thai_jasmine_red_cargo_rice.shortDescription: Non-glutinous long-grain red cargo rice. Only rice grain shells removed, retaining vitamins, nutrients, and minerals in the bran and kernel.
thai_jasmine_red_cargo_rice.grainSpec: Variety: Long Grain Rice | Color: Red
thai_jasmine_red_cargo_rice.fullDescription: Thai Red Cargo Rice is a worthy source of riboflavin (vitamin B2), thiamin (vitamin B1), iron, fiber, and calcium. More aromatic and nutty when cooked; takes longer to cook than white rice but not as long as brown rice. High-quality Red Cargo Rice exported from Thailand.

thai_long_grain_rice.name: Thai Long Grain Rice
thai_long_grain_rice.shortDescription: Premium Thai long-grain white rice — delicate aroma, superior taste, elongated grains that cook fluffy. Versatile for traditional Thai and international cuisine.
thai_long_grain_rice.fullDescription: Thai Long Grain Rice (Oryza sativa) features extra-long, slender grains milled and polished to perfection. Translucent white grains with moisture below 14%, broken grains below 5%, and no foreign matter. Renowned for delicate aroma, superior taste, and grains that cook perfectly fluffy. Packed with essential nutrients, vitamins, and minerals.
thai_long_grain_rice.storage: Cool, dry place away from direct sunlight

thai_parboiled_rice.name: Thai Parboiled Rice
thai_parboiled_rice.shortDescription: Premium Thai parboiled rice — steam-parboiled medium to long grains with translucent golden color. Retains nutrients; cooks firm and separate.
thai_parboiled_rice.grainSpec: Grain Type: Medium to long grains
thai_parboiled_rice.fullDescription: Premium Thai Parboiled Rice undergoes special parboiling that preserves nutrients, resulting in firmer, less sticky grains with a golden hue. Nutty, slightly earthy taste; retains more vitamins and minerals; lower glycemic index. Ideal for pilafs, salads, casseroles, and global cuisines. ISO, HACCP, and TAS certified.
thai_parboiled_rice.storage: Shelf life up to 2 years under recommended storage

thai_riceberry_rice.name: Thai Riceberry Rice
thai_riceberry_rice.shortDescription: Purple whole-grain Thai specialty rice — rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals. Origin: Thailand.
thai_riceberry_rice.brokenSpec: Cross: Thai Hom Mali × local black rice
thai_riceberry_rice.fullDescription: Thai Riceberry Rice is a Thai purple rice variety developed from a cross between Thai Hom Mali (jasmine) and local black rice. Deep purple-burgundy bran when raw; nutty aroma and soft, slightly chewy texture when cooked. Retains bran for higher fiber, antioxidants (anthocyanins), and micronutrients compared to white rice.

thai_white_rice_10_broken.name: Thai White Rice 10% Broken
thai_white_rice_10_broken.shortDescription: Long Grain White Rice (10% Broken) — known for quality, non-stickiness, and taste. Available in different packaging quantities.
thai_white_rice_10_broken.brokenSpec: Milling Degree: Well Milled 100% sortexed clean
thai_white_rice_10_broken.fullDescription: Long Grain White Rice 10% broken — premium quality at competitive pricing for global buyers. Export-grade milling with well-milled, 100% sortexed clean specification.

thai_white_rice_100_broken.name: Thai White rice 100% broken
thai_white_rice_100_broken.shortDescription: 100% broken white rice grade — suitable for industrial use, animal feed, rice flour, and food manufacturing.
thai_white_rice_100_broken.fullDescription: Thai White Rice 100% broken — premium broken rice grade for industrial and food processing applications. Consistent quality for rice flour, animal feed, brewing, and food manufacturing.

thai_white_rice_100_sortexed.name: Thai White Rice 100% Sortexed
thai_white_rice_100_sortexed.shortDescription: Premium sortexed white rice — long, slender, fluffy grains. Sortex technology removes broken grains, stones, and husks for uniform quality.
thai_white_rice_100_sortexed.fullDescription: Thai White Rice 100% sortexed is a premium variety meticulously sorted for exceptional quality. Sourced from Thailand's fertile fields — pure white grains that are long, slender, and fluffy. Sortexing removes impurities; only the finest, most uniform grains remain. Extra Well Milled degree.

thai_white_rice_25_broken.name: Thai White Rice 25% Broken
thai_white_rice_25_broken.shortDescription: Long Grain White Rice (25% Broken) — best quality for global buyers. Economical pricing with fragrance and rich minerals.
thai_white_rice_25_broken.fullDescription: Long Grain White Rice 25% Broken — widely used in food manufacturing for fragrance, vitamin content, and rich minerals. Well milled, 100% sortexed clean specification.

white_rice_5_broken.name: White Rice 5% Broken
white_rice_5_broken.shortDescription: Thai White Rice 5% Broken — superior quality long-grain white rice at competitive pricing.
white_rice_5_broken.fullDescription: Premium 5 Percent White Rice for global export buyers. Long-grain white rice with soft texture, well milled and polished. Current crop year from Thailand.

whyUs.label: Why TAT Global
whyUs.headline: The Export Partner International Buyers Trust
whyUs.r1Desc: All rice sourced directly from Thailand's top growing regions. Authenticity guaranteed.
whyUs.r2Desc: GMP, HACCP, and ISO 22000 certified facilities. Food safety is non-negotiable.
whyUs.r3Desc: Direct-from-mill pricing with no middlemen. Cost-efficient for large orders.
whyUs.r4Desc: From 5kg retail bags to 1MT jumbo bulk bags. Private label available.
whyUs.r5Desc: Full suite: COA, Phytosanitary, COO, Bill of Lading. Zero paperwork headaches.
whyUs.r6Desc: Quote within 24 hours. Dedicated account manager for every buyer.

quality.label: Quality Assurance
quality.headline: From Paddy to Port — Zero Compromise on Quality
quality.certBody: Every batch ships with documentation that meets the import requirements of your country.
quality.thirdPartyBody: Optional SGS, Bureau Veritas, or Intertek inspection available.
quality.step1: Paddy Sourcing — We partner with certified Thai farmers in premium growing zones.
quality.step2: Pre-Milling Inspection — Moisture, grain size, and contamination checks before processing.
quality.step3: Precision Milling — State-of-the-art milling lines calibrated for consistent broken percentage.
quality.step4: Post-Milling Grading — Whiteness, grain length, and purity graded by our quality lab.
quality.step5: Third-Party Inspection — Optional SGS, Bureau Veritas, or Intertek inspection available.
quality.step6: Export Certification — All required certificates issued before shipment.

qualityPage.pageHeadline: From Paddy to Port — Zero Compromise on Quality

packaging.label: Packaging & Logistics
packaging.headline: Flexible Packaging. Reliable Export Logistics.
packaging.p1: Retail Bags: 500g, 1kg, 2kg, 5kg — ideal for supermarket and specialty retail
packaging.p2: Commercial Bags: 10kg, 25kg PP woven bags — standard for food service and distributors
packaging.p3: Industrial Bags: 50kg PP woven bags — wholesale and institutional supply
packaging.p4: Jumbo Bags: 1,000kg (1MT) big bags — bulk industrial and feed applications
packaging.p5: Private Label: Custom printing, any language, any market specification
packaging.s3: We work with leading freight forwarders globally
packaging.s4: Estimated transit times available per destination

packagingPage.privateProgramBody: We offer a complete private label program including custom bag printing in any language, nutritional label formatting for your target market, and full compliance documentation. Lead time is approximately 45 days from artwork approval.

markets.subheadline: Our rice reaches kitchens, restaurants, and food factories across every major continent.

markets.mapCaption: Indicative map of regions where TAT Global supplies bulk rice. Gold markers highlight active export corridors.

marketsPage.docsBody: Every shipment is supported by complete documentation for import compliance, including Certificate of Analysis, Phytosanitary Certificate, and Certificate of Origin.

testimonials.label: What Our Buyers Say
testimonials.headline: Trusted by Importers Worldwide
testimonials.quote1: "TAT Global has been our primary Thai rice supplier for three years. Their consistency in quality and documentation has made our import process seamless. Highly recommended for serious bulk buyers."
testimonials.author1: — Ahmed Al-Rashid, General Manager, Gulf Foods Trading LLC (UAE)
testimonials.quote2: "We source jasmine rice for our supermarket chain's private label. TAT Global's private label program is professional, responsive, and the quality is consistently excellent. Our customers love the product."
testimonials.author2: — Sophie Chen, Procurement Director, FreshMart Supermarkets (Singapore)
testimonials.quote3: "As a food manufacturer, we need rice that meets strict specifications every batch. TAT Global delivers that. Their lab reports are thorough and their export documentation is always complete."
testimonials.author3: — David Mensah, Supply Chain Manager, West Africa Food Industries (Ghana)

faqPage.label: FAQ
faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.q1: What is the minimum order quantity?
faqPage.a1: Our standard MOQ is 20 MT (one 20ft container). For specialty varieties or private label, we can accommodate lower MOQs from 5–10 MT. Contact us to discuss your specific needs.
faqPage.q2: Do you offer private label packaging?
faqPage.a2: Yes. We offer a complete private label program including custom bag printing in any language, nutritional label formatting for your target market, and full compliance documentation. Lead time is approximately 45 days from artwork approval.
faqPage.q3: What certifications does your rice carry?
faqPage.a3: Our facilities are certified GMP, HACCP, and ISO 22000. Each shipment is supported by a Certificate of Analysis, Phytosanitary Certificate, and Certificate of Origin. Halal certification is available upon request.
faqPage.a4: We typically ship FOB from Laem Chabang or Bangkok Port. CIF terms are available upon request. We work with trusted freight forwarders globally.
faqPage.q5: How quickly can you respond to a quote request?
faqPage.a5: We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 business hours. For urgent requirements, please indicate this in your message or contact us directly on WhatsApp.
faqPage.a6: Yes, we can arrange product samples (typically 1–2 kg per variety) for qualified buyers. Sample shipping costs may apply depending on destination. Please contact our sales team.
faqPage.q7: What markets do you currently supply?
faqPage.a7: We currently supply buyers in 40+ countries across Southeast Asia, the Middle East, Africa, Europe, and the Americas. We are experienced with the import requirements and documentation of most major rice-importing countries.
faqPage.a8: Simply click "Request a Quote" anywhere on this website, fill in your requirements, and our export team will be in touch within 24 hours. No commitment required.

privacyPage.label: Legal
privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: TAT GLOBAL CO., LTD ("TAT Global", "we", "us") operates tatglcoltd.com as a business-to-business rice export website. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect personal data when you request quotes, contact our sales team, or subscribe to updates.
privacyPage.s1Body:
TAT GLOBAL CO., LTD
Thailand
Email: sales@tatglcoltd.com
Website: tatglcoltd.com

We process personal data in connection with wholesale rice inquiries and business communications only.
privacyPage.s2Body:
Depending on how you interact with us, we may collect:

• Identity and contact details: name, company name, business email, phone or WhatsApp number, country
• Inquiry details: product interest, quantities, packaging preferences, destination port, messages, and optional file attachments
• Technical data: IP address, browser type, and basic server logs when you submit a form
• Newsletter: business email address and consent records
• Cookies: essential cookies for site functionality and cookie-consent preference (see Section 9)
privacyPage.s3Body:
We use your data to:

• Respond to quote requests and contact messages
• Prepare quotations, samples, and export documentation discussions
• Send business updates if you subscribed to our newsletter (you may unsubscribe at any time)
• Prevent spam and abuse (honeypot fields, rate limiting)
• Improve website security and reliability

We do not sell your personal data.
privacyPage.s4Body:
If you are located in the European Economic Area, United Kingdom, or similar jurisdictions, we rely on:

• Consent — when you tick the privacy checkbox or subscribe to marketing emails
• Legitimate interests — to respond to B2B inquiries, operate our website, and protect against fraud
• Contractual necessity — when processing is required to evaluate or fulfil a commercial relationship you request
privacyPage.s5Body: We retain inquiry and quote records for as long as needed to manage the commercial relationship, comply with export and accounting obligations, and resolve disputes — typically up to seven years for business correspondence unless a shorter period is required by law. Newsletter data is kept until you unsubscribe or ask us to delete it.
privacyPage.s6Body:
We may share data with trusted processors who help us operate the website and communications, such as:

• Email delivery providers (e.g. Resend) to send inquiry notifications
• Hosting and infrastructure providers for the website

These providers process data only on our instructions and under appropriate safeguards. We may also disclose information if required by law or to protect our legal rights.
privacyPage.s7Body: TAT Global is based in Thailand. If you submit data from another country, your information may be transferred to and processed in Thailand or in countries where our service providers operate. We take reasonable steps to ensure appropriate protection consistent with applicable law.
privacyPage.s8Body: Depending on your location, you may have the right to access, correct, delete, restrict, or object to certain processing of your personal data, and to withdraw consent where processing is consent-based. To exercise these rights, email sales@tatglcoltd.com. You may also lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.
privacyPage.s9Body: We use essential cookies and local storage to remember your cookie-consent choice. We do not use third-party advertising cookies on this site. You can control cookies through your browser settings; disabling essential cookies may affect basic site behaviour.
privacyPage.s10Body:
We may update this policy from time to time. The "Last updated" date at the top will change when we do. Continued use of the website after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy where permitted by law.

Questions: sales@tatglcoltd.com

common.certCoo: Certificate of Origin (Form D / Form AI)
